message.thinking:
We need to answer each of the 3 questions. Provide JSON array with 3 objects. Each object has "question" field: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure". Provide feedback text, and "complies" boolean.

We need to evaluate the given text.

Text:

"Ievads ietver trīs daļas:
1.	Tēmas aktualitātes pamatojums un/vai pētījuma motivācija. 
2.	Noslēguma darba mērķis un tā sasniegšanai izvirzītie uzdevumi.
3.	Īss katras noslēguma darba nodaļas un pielikumu satura apraksts. 
Ievada apjoms ir 1–2 lappuses."

We need to see if it lists main sections of thesis? It lists parts of introduction, not main sections of thesis. So does not list main sections. So compliance false.

Description: Does text briefly describe contents of each section? It gives titles of three parts, but not description of contents beyond titles. So maybe partial. But question 2: "Does the text briefly describe contents of each section." It only gives titles, not descriptions. So not fully. So false.

Structure: Can it be easily understood what is general structure of thesis just from this text? It only describes introduction structure, not overall thesis. So not. So false.

Thus all false. Provide feedback accordingly.

Return JSON array.
